action_items.description: Add regression fixture for the failed reasoning dimension.
action_items.done_definition: fixture fails before repair and passes after repair

failure_classes.symptom: claim lacks sufficient grounding or evidence binding

learning_hooks: persist failure class and route in receipt
promote recurring failure to ECL if it repeats

five_whys: Why score low? evidence missing or weak
Why evidence weak? research/normalization did not supply binding
root_cause_analysis.preventive_change: route to smallest repair stage and add regression fixture
root_cause_analysis.systemic_cause: prior stage did not bind enough evidence before reasoning evaluation
